channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 500,000 — Borrowdale West:7-Bed Home with Borehole & Bright Plastered Interiors, Borrowdale West (Borrowdale West, Harare North)
item.description: USD 500,000 — Borrowdale West, Harare North. 7 beds, 5 baths. Borrowdale West:7-Bed Home with Borehole & Bright Plastered Interiors, Borrowdale West. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
